run_purpose: Observe calibration_diff between two reports; not auto winner selection.

cases.expected_behavior: false_positives_delta negative; reduced_false_positives improvement; review_gate_inflation regression; interpretation notes mention mixed shift.
cases.actual_behavior:
{
  "drift_severity": "high",
  "stable": false,
  "false_positives_delta": -25,
  "false_positive_rate_delta": -0.25,
  "human_review_required_rate_delta": 0.18,
  "regression_flags": [
    "review_gate_inflation"
  ],
  "improvement_flags": [
    "reduced_false_positives"
  ],
  "interpretation_notes": [
    "candidate run reduced false positives vs baseline",
    "candidate run increased human_review_required escalation",
    "candidate reduced FP but increased human review escalation — mixed reliability shift"
  ],
  "benchmark_comparable": true
}

cases.expected_behavior: false_positive_regression; false_positives_delta positive; reduced_review_gate_escalation improvement; mixed reliability note.
cases.actual_behavior:
{
  "drift_severity": "high",
  "stable": false,
  "false_positives_delta": 20,
  "false_positive_rate_delta": 0.2,
  "human_review_required_rate_delta": -0.15,
  "regression_flags": [
    "false_positive_regression"
  ],
  "improvement_flags": [
    "reduced_review_gate_escalation",
    "reduced_pattern_hint_dependence"
  ],
  "interpretation_notes": [
    "candidate run increased false positives vs baseline",
    "candidate run lowered human review escalation rate",
    "candidate worsened FP but reduced review escalation — mixed reliability shift"
  ],
  "benchmark_comparable": true
}
